description: CollegeFootballData provides structured college football datasets, analytics, and related tools such as an exporter and metrics explorers. Its service centers on access to historical, live, and analytical college football data for modeling and application development.
summary: CollegeFootballData exposes a REST API and a GraphQL API, both authenticated with a user-issued CFBD API key sent as a Bearer token; no first-party CLI or MCP server was confirmed.
